name: @kurrent/gaffer-telemetry-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker that ingests gaffer telemetry envelopes, translates to PostHog's batch shape, and redirects the legacy notice routes to the docs site

scripts.check: pnpm run build && eslint . && prettier --check . && tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm run build && vitest run && wrangler deploy --env staging --dry-run --outdir=.wrangler/dryrun
